summary.weather: Seoul (Monday, March 30, 2026): Clear skies, no precipitation. Temperatures expected to range between 7°C (44°F) and 14°C (57°F), typical of early spring.
summary.market: Asian markets remain under pressure as of March 30, 2026, driven by geopolitical concerns in the Middle East and concerns over oil supply. Regional equity indices, including KOSPI, are seeing significant volatility. Investors are cautious amid global market weakness and Federal Reserve commentary.
summary.art: Art Market (Mar 30, 2026): The market shows resilient high-end performance, favoring established names. Recent auctions in London and New York have demonstrated strong results for Modern works. Collectors are pivoting toward quality and provenance while navigating broader economic uncertainties.
